Class KeySignature

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.social.arts.music.KeySignature
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class KeySignature extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a musical key signature.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
